author: y4rr
content:
Plan: Implement 4 GPU FFT ops for Sprint C.6 (#636):
1. hfft_f32/f64: conj kernel (PTX) + irfft via cuFFT C2R — added to kernels.rs + cufft.rs
2. ihfft_f32/f64: rfft via cuFFT R2C + conj kernel — same files
3. fftn3d_c2c_f32/f64: cufftPlan3d for 3-D C2C — new functions in cufft.rs
4. New trait methods in gpu_dispatch.rs GpuBackend trait
5. Impl wired in backend_impl.rs
6. Dispatch branches in fft.rs (hfft/ihfft/fftn/ifftn)
7. Conformance tests in conformance_fft.rs (gpu_hfft, gpu_ihfft, gpu_fftn, gpu_ifftn)
8. Probe file _probe_c6_fft_3d.rs

CONJ PTX approach: thread i negates buf[2*i+1] in-place. f64 variant via get_f64_ptx.
hfft = memcpy + conj + irfft (cuFFT C2R)
ihfft = rfft (cuFFT R2C) + scale(1/n) + conj
fftn3d = cufftPlan3d(d,h,w,C2C/Z2Z) — unbatched [d,h,w,2] complex
Tolerance: F64_FFT = 1e-10 for probe assertions.
cascade_skip removals: comment out the fftn/ifftn/hfft/ihfft CPU-only note in conformance_fft.rs.
